title: RelBench rel-hm Dataset Preparation for JRN Estimation
summary: Demo notebook for the RelBench rel-hm (H&M) relational dataset prepared for Join Reproduction Number (JRN) estimation. Loads 3 tables (customers, articles, transactions) with 2 FK joins exhibiting extreme cardinality variation (fan-out 1–50,287). Computes full join statistics, creates a stratified subsample preserving natural fan-out distribution, and provides examples with time-based train/val/test splits for 4 prediction tasks (user-churn classification, item-sales regression, price regression, user-item-purchase link prediction). The mini data JSON contains 14 curated examples across all tables with detailed metadata including fan-out buckets and fold assignments.
